name: Play Store Sentiment
description: Deep Play Store sentiment module for Android apps. Given an app ID or store URL (preferably resolved first via find-platform-handles), scrape reviews, score sentiment across star ratings, and extract themes, complaints, and feature requests. Use this whenever the user asks about mobile app feedback, store reputation, or wants Play Store included in a multi-channel deep analysis.

appId.description: Play Store app ID or full store URL
